failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
  p.id AS profile_id,
  p.username,
  p.full_name,
  ts_rank(p.biography_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', 'healthy & restaurant')) AS rank
FROM profile p
WHERE p.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'healthy & restaurant')
ORDER BY rank DESC
LIMIT 10;

failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
  p.id AS profile_id,
  p.username,
  p.full_name,
  ts_rank(p.biography_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', 'healthy | nutrition | wellness')) AS rank
FROM profile p
WHERE p.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'healthy | nutrition | wellness')
  AND (p.is_brand = TRUE OR p.full_name ILIKE '%restaurant%' OR p.biography ILIKE '%restaurant%')
ORDER BY rank DESC, p.num_followers DESC
LIMIT 10;

failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
  p.id AS profile_id,
  p.username,
  p.full_name,
  ts_rank(p.biography_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', 'healthy & (restaurant | nutrition | food)')) AS rank
FROM profile p
WHERE p.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'healthy & (restaurant | nutrition | food)')
  AND (p.is_brand = TRUE OR p.full_name ILIKE '%restaurant%' OR p.biography ILIKE '%restaurant%')
ORDER BY rank DESC, p.num_followers DESC
LIMIT 10;
